title: pancratium st-mariae
intro: Pancratium st-mariae, also known as Mary's Breath, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant activities, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Pancratium st-mariae include relieving coughs, reducing inflammation, and easing respiratory congestion, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health.
